version.description: Schema version — increment on breaking changes

model_id.description: HuggingFace model ID (author/repo) or local path

default_weight.description: Default LoRA influence weight (aesthetic optimum for this model)

trigger_words.description: Keywords that must appear in the prompt to activate this LoRA

compatible_models.description: Internal model types this LoRA is compatible with

guidance_delta.description: Signed adjustment to guidance scale when this LoRA is active

style_tokens.description: Optional style tokens prepended to prompt when LoRA is used standalone

description.description: One-line human-readable description of the visual effect
